description: Fix all high, medium, and applicable low-severity issues identified in the v0.2.2 codebase audit (docs/research/001-codebase-audit.md). Covers bugs, doc drift, dead code cleanup, consistency improvements, and security messaging.

userStories.title: Validate canonicalization.level range (1–3) at config and schema level
userStories.description: H-2 + L-8: set_config_value accepts any u8 for canonicalization.level despite the error message saying 1–3. Add range validation in both set_config_value (CLI) and at the serde deserialization level in config/schema.rs so invalid values (0, 4–255) are rejected at parse time.
acceptanceCriteria: set_config_value rejects level=0 and level=4 with a clear error
Parsing a config.toml with level=0 or level=255 returns an error
Valid levels (1, 2, 3) continue to work
Unit tests cover all boundary cases (0, 1, 2, 3, 4)
cargo test && cargo clippy -- -D warnings && cargo fmt --check pass

userStories.title: Fix status_impl hardcoded branch, ring buffer global path, and temp filename collision
userStories.description: H-1: status_impl hardcodes 'main' instead of cfg.storage.branch. H-3: Error ring buffer uses RingBuffer::default_path() (global ~/.local/share/chronicle/errors.jsonl) instead of a repo-relative path — same race condition class fixed for the state cache. M-5: StateCache::save uses subsec_nanos() for temp filename uniqueness; should use as_nanos() like ring_buffer.rs does. Fix all three.
acceptanceCriteria: status_impl passes cfg.storage.branch to RepoManager::init_or_open
RingBuffer gets a path_for_repo() method deriving path from storage.repo_path
sync_impl, push_impl, pull_impl use RingBuffer::path_for_repo() instead of default_path()
StateCache::save temp filename uses as_nanos() (full nanoseconds since epoch)
Existing tests pass; new tests verify status_impl with non-main branch config
cargo test && cargo clippy -- -D warnings && cargo fmt --check pass

userStories.title: Document Claude decode_dir lossiness and improve SSH auth error message
userStories.description: H-4: ClaudeAgent::decode_dir is lossy for paths with dots (both '.' and '/' encode to '-'). The Agent trait doc does not mention this. Add prominent documentation to the trait and to decode_dir explaining the lossiness, and log a warning when decoded paths contain '//' artifacts. M-9: SSH key file fallback error message should mention passphrase-protected keys as a known limitation.
acceptanceCriteria: Agent trait has doc comment noting decode_dir may be lossy for Claude
ClaudeAgent::decode_dir doc explains the dot/slash encoding ambiguity
SSH fallback error message mentions passphrase-protected keys and ssh-agent
No new test failures introduced
cargo test && cargo clippy -- -D warnings && cargo fmt --check pass

userStories.title: Remove #![allow(dead_code)] blankets from all modules
userStories.description: M-7: Every source module has #![allow(dead_code)] with comments referencing user-story delivery. All 21 stories are complete. Remove the blankets, fix or #[allow] only specific genuinely unused items, and ensure the crate compiles cleanly.
acceptanceCriteria: No #![allow(dead_code)] at module level in any source file
#[allow(dead_code)] used only on specific items that are intentionally unused public API
lib.rs crate-level #![allow(dead_code)] removed or replaced with targeted allows
cargo build produces no dead_code warnings (or only suppressed intentional ones)
cargo test && cargo clippy -- -D warnings && cargo fmt --check pass
userStories.notes: Audit ref: M-7. This touches every .rs file so should run after code changes in US-001–003 to avoid merge conflicts.

userStories.title: Consolidate expand_path / expand_home into a single testable function
userStories.description: M-2: config::expand_path uses dirs::home_dir() for tilde expansion while cli::expand_home accepts an explicit home parameter. sync_impl, push_impl, and pull_impl call config::expand_path (real $HOME), making them not fully testable with injected home dirs. Consolidate into a single expand_path(path, home) in config, and have the convenience wrapper call dirs::home_dir(). Update all CLI callers to use the home-parameterised version.
acceptanceCriteria: config::expand_path_with_home(path, home) exists and is used by all CLI _impl functions
config::expand_path(path) delegates to expand_path_with_home with dirs::home_dir()
cli::expand_home private function is removed
sync_impl, push_impl, pull_impl use the home-parameterised version
All existing tests pass; status_impl uses the same function
cargo test && cargo clippy -- -D warnings && cargo fmt --check pass

userStories.title: Fix push_impl consistency: update manifest and wire on_rejection
userStories.description: L-3: push_impl does not update manifest.json (last_sync never written for push-only users). L-4: push_with_retry on_rejection is a no-op closure so retries can't recover from real push rejections. Fix push_impl to update the manifest like sync_impl does, and wire on_rejection to perform fetch + integrate_remote_changes so push retries can actually resolve divergence.
acceptanceCriteria: push_impl calls build_updated_manifest and writes+stages manifest.json
push_with_retry on_rejection performs fetch('origin') + integrate_remote_changes
Test verifies manifest.json last_sync is updated after a successful push
cargo test && cargo clippy -- -D warnings && cargo fmt --check pass
userStories.notes: Audit refs: L-3 (push_impl manifest), L-4 (push_impl on_rejection no-op)

userStories.title: Deprecate StateCache::default_path and add crate-level documentation
userStories.description: M-4: StateCache::default_path() is superseded by path_for_repo() but not deprecated. M-6: lib.rs has no crate-level //! documentation. Add #[deprecated] to default_path() pointing users to path_for_repo(), and add a crate-level doc block to lib.rs describing the crate purpose.
acceptanceCriteria: StateCache::default_path() has #[deprecated(note = ...)] pointing to path_for_repo()
The one test calling default_path uses #[allow(deprecated)]
lib.rs has a //! crate-level doc block
cargo test && cargo clippy -- -D warnings && cargo fmt --check pass

userStories.title: Update all stale documentation to match delivered implementation
userStories.description: Fix all documentation drift and missing content: M-1 (AGENTS.md tree still shows pre-implementation layout), M-3 (dev guide CI section aspirational vs actual), M-8 (spec §13 crate structure), L-1 (AGENTS.md missing lib.rs, integration.rs, LICENSE, community files, CI dirs), L-2 (README missing chronicle errors, config, push, pull commands).
acceptanceCriteria: AGENTS.md repository structure matches actual file layout including lib.rs, tests/, LICENSE, community docs, .github/, .forgejo/
docs/002-development-guide.md CI section references the actual workflow files
docs/specs/001-initial-delivery.md §13 matches the actual module file layout
README.md Usage section covers all CLI commands (init, import, sync, push, pull, status, errors, config, schedule)
All doc files with front-matter have date_modified bumped
cargo test && cargo clippy -- -D warnings && cargo fmt --check pass
userStories.notes: Audit refs: M-1 (AGENTS.md:55–65), M-3 (docs/002), M-8 (docs/specs/001 §13), L-1 (AGENTS.md), L-2 (README.md)
